mapper.insert: INSERT INTO catalog_sync_task (account_id, snapshot_id, goods_id, collection_name, status, retry_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{snapshotId}, #{goodsId}, #{collection}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE collection_name = COALESCE(NULLIF(VALUES(collection_name), ''), collection_name), status = CASE WHEN status = 'PROCESSING' THEN status ELSE 'PENDING' END, failure_reason = NULL, updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT id, account_id, snapshot_id, goods_id, collection_name AS collection, status, failure_reason, retry_count, last_attempt_at, created_at, updated_at FROM catalog_sync_task WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} AND (status = #{pendingStatus} OR (status = #{failedStatus} AND retry_count < #{maxRetryCount})) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE catalog_sync_task SET status = #{processingStatus}, failure_reason = NULL, retry_count = retry_count + 1, last_attempt_at = #{now}, updated_at = #{now} WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN (#{pendingStatus}, #{failedStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM catalog_sync_task WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} AND (status IN (#{pendingStatus}, #{processingStatus}) OR (status = #{failedStatus} AND retry_count < #{maxRetryCount}))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM catalog_sync_task WHERE snapshot_id = #{snapshotId} AND succeeded_once = 0 AND (status IN (#{pendingStatus}, #{processingStatus}) OR (status = #{failedStatus} AND retry_count < #{maxRetryCount}))
